sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, description String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'My father is from Mexico.');
UPDATE test_strings SET description = overlay(description, 'sibling', 3) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT overlay(description, 'sister', 1, 2) AS modified_description FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT overlay('A quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.', 'slow', -8, 3) AS altered_string;
